basicInfo.name: Nightmare Catty
basicInfo.flavor: She once attacked Jin out of her feral instinct, but quickly lost the fight. She started to follow him and began to train under his tutelage.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Claw Attack
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 245% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 245% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Expose Weakness
Skill 2.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants All Debuff Removal.
 - Heals HP equal to 7% of the caster's Max HP for each debuff removed.

Passive.name: Sharp Claws
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Physical Attack Boost. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
When Catty was just a newborn, Moonlit Isle was embroiled in constant war.
Her parents were killed in one of the many battles on the isle.
Alone in the village, Catty was on the brink of death when she was saved by a group of cats that took her in.
Having never lived among humans, Catty knew little of their ways, relying instead on the sharp feline instincts she developed in the wild.
Her world changed when she encountered Coco.
While hunting him, Catty stumbled into a human village, unwittingly entering Lina's house.
Lina happened to be out on a walk.
Startled to see a human for the first time, Catty ran away.
Returning to her group of cats, Catty began to realize how different she was from them.
Meanwhile, Lina sent Jin and a search party to find Catty. Though Catty resisted, she was ultimately captured by Jin.
Catty was taken to Lina and began to learn about human life.
However, Catty kept running away, yearning to return to the cats she knew as family. Eventually, Lina let her be free.
From then on, Catty lived between the human and feline worlds. She also came to admire Jin for singlehandedly defeating her, and she secretly started training under him.
When war threatened Moonlit Isle once more, Catty's wild instincts nurtured by cats and the skills she gained from training with Jin turned her into an exceptional ninja.
